name: TimeStamp
summary: This class is used to set creation time of async task in Dynamo Scheduler.

methods.name: op_GreaterThan(Dynamo.Scheduler.TimeStamp, Dynamo.Scheduler.TimeStamp)
methods.summary: The public usage of time stamps should be restricted to these methods which are used to ensure an ordering on timestamps

params.name: timeStamp0
params.doc: The first time stamp in comparison.

params.name: timeStamp1
params.doc: The second time stamp in comparison.

returns.doc: Return true if the first time stamp was created later than the second time stamp, or false otherwise.

methods.name: op_LessThan(Dynamo.Scheduler.TimeStamp, Dynamo.Scheduler.TimeStamp)
methods.summary: The public usage of time stamps should be restricted to these methods which are used to ensure an ordering on timestamps

params.name: timeStamp0
params.doc: The first time stamp in comparison.

params.name: timeStamp1
params.doc: The second time stamp in comparison.

returns.doc: Return true if the first time stamp was created earlier than the second time stamp, or false otherwise.
